underlying_goal: Optimize MCTS game AI performance through profiling-guided code changes and add state evaluator methods to multiple game implementations
friction_detail: ContiguousArray optimization regressed or showed no improvement and had to be fully reverted.
brief_summary: User iteratively optimized MCTS performance via profiling (indirect enum, custom hashing gave 41% speedup; ContiguousArray was reverted), then added state evaluators to three games — all achieved successfully.
